message: 🌱 Add metallb: Re-implement helm chart mission (#688)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "metallb-653-re-implement-helm-chart",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "metallb: Re-implement helm chart",
+    "description": "Re-implement helm chart. Requested by 20+ users.",
+    "type": "deploy",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current metallb deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your metallb version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n metallb -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metallb\nhelm list -n metallb 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working metallb installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review metallb configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant metallb configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n metallb -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metallb\nkubectl get configmap -n metallb -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=metallb\n```\nI have started a re-implementation of the metallb helm chart based on a combination of the previous chart in this repo, the [stable/metallb](https://github.com/helm/charts/tree/master/stable/metallb) chart in the soon-to-be-deprecated stable repo,"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Re-implement helm chart",
+        "description": "Create a new helm chart integrating features of the previous chart, as\nwell as stable/metallb and bitnami/metallb.\n\nFeatures:\n* Support new environment variables in speaker\n* Use PodMonitor instead of ServiceMonitor (no need to create Services)\n* Create PrometheusRule to detect stale config and config-not-loaded\n* Configurable PrometheusRule alerts for address pool exhaustion\n* Support MetalLB controller creating memberlist secret\n* Standardize labels using template helper\n* Create\n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n metallb -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metallb\nkubectl get events -n metallb --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Re-implement helm chart\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Create a new helm chart integrating features of the previous chart, as\nwell as stable/metallb and bitnami/metallb.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "metallb",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "deploy"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "metallb"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Role",
+      "Service"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "deploy"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/metallb/metallb/issues/653",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/metallb/metallb",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/metallb/metallb/pull/658"
+    },
+    "reactions": 20,
+    "comments": 2,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with metallb installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
